disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Passengers exposed to hantavirus get Nebraska food, Tai Chi and tornado warning experience during quarantine - Yahoo News Canada
updates.body_en: Passengers exposed to hantavirus get Nebraska food, Tai Chi and tornado warning experience during quarantine Yahoo News Canada
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大乘客在隔离期间体验内布拉斯加食物、太极和龙卷风预警。

updates.title_en: Americans exposed to hantavirus on ship enjoy some Nebraska hospitality while waiting in quarantine - The Independent
updates.body_en: Americans exposed to hantavirus on ship enjoy some Nebraska hospitality while waiting in quarantine The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 美国乘客在邮轮上接触汉坦病毒后，在内布拉斯加隔离中享受款待。

updates.title_en: Federal Update on Hantavirus and Ebola Outbreaks – May 22, 2026 - CPAC.ca
updates.body_en: Federal Update on Hantavirus and Ebola Outbreaks – May 22, 2026 CPAC.ca
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大联邦更新汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情通报。

updates.title_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says - CBC
updates.body_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says CBC Canada’s top doctor set to give an update on both Ebola and hantavirus today CityNews Toronto Ontario traveller tests negative for Ebola; no further cases of hantavirus confirmed in Canada National Post
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席公共卫生官称无埃博拉病例，无新增汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: WHO says new hantavirus case among Hondius ship's crew - Medical Xpress
updates.body_en: WHO says new hantavirus case among Hondius ship's crew Medical Xpress
updates.summary_zh: WHO 通报 Hondius 号邮轮船员新增一例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: Ontario man tests negative for Ebola; no further cases of hantavirus confirmed in Canada - Yahoo News Canada
updates.body_en: Ontario man tests negative for Ebola; no further cases of hantavirus confirmed in Canada Yahoo News Canada
updates.summary_zh: 安大略省男子埃博拉检测阴性，加拿大无新增汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: VIDEO: Study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some areas of PNW - KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.body_en: VIDEO: Study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some areas of PNW KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.summary_zh: 研究显示美国太平洋西北部分地区汉坦病毒流行率高。

updates.body_en: Polish captain of hantavirus-hit ship to return home after negative tests TVP World

updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Final 14 days of home quarantine for negative cases Euronews.com
updates.summary_zh: 阴性病例需完成最后14天居家隔离。
